summary: Simple content-sharing website for posting text, links, and images with minimal design
architectural_notes: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript only (no backend frameworks)
Static site with no database (localStorage or JSON files for data)
Minimal & clean UI with responsive design
Internet Identity authentication for developer access control
Backend stores authorized developer principal ID
Post creation/management restricted to developer only

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that displays all posts in a clean, card-based layout with newest posts first, showing title, description, and content preview
Build a post creation form with fields for title, description, content type selector (text/link/image), content input, and optional image URL input
For link posts, render the link as clickable and include a 'Copy Link' button that copies the URL to clipboard
For image posts, display the image inline within the post card with proper sizing and aspect ratio preservation
Implement a basic search bar that filters displayed posts by matching keywords in title or description
Create static pages for About, Contact, and Privacy Policy with navigation links in header or footer
Apply a minimal, clean design system with a monochromatic color scheme (white or dark mode), ample whitespace, readable typography, and no heavy animations
Ensure the entire website is fully responsive with mobile-first layout that adapts smoothly to tablet and desktop screens
Update the application configuration to support custom domain 'modxrdx.io' by configuring the canister settings and DNS mapping requirements
Update the HTML meta tags and page title to reflect the custom domain name 'modxrdx.io'
Apply a vivid purple background color across all pages of the website by updating the root CSS variables in frontend/src/index.css to use a vivid purple color scheme for both light and dark modes
Add 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font to the navigation menu in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx, displaying it prominently in both desktop and mobile (sheet menu) navigation
Display 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font prominently on the homepage in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, positioned above the search bar and post listings

Replace the entire Contact page content in frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx with only two social media links: Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/modxrdx?igsh=dmRpazF4M2dndHE2) with label 'Instagram ~' and Telegram (https://t.me/MODxRDX) with label 'Telegram ~', removing all existing contact information and text
Remove all 'Simple Share' text and branding from the navigation header in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx

Replace the 'MOD x RDX' text in the navigation header of frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx with the uploaded MOD x RDX logo image (image2.png), making it clickable and linking to the homepage route ('/')
Replace the 'MOD x RDX' text on the homepage in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx with the uploaded MOD x RDX logo image (image2.png), making it clickable and linking to the homepage route ('/')
Update the mobile sheet menu navigation in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx to display the MOD x RDX logo image instead of the 'MOD x RDX' text, ensuring it is properly sized for mobile view
Update any remaining references to 'Simple Share' throughout the frontend codebase (including AboutPage.tsx and PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx) to use 'MOD x RDX' instead

Replace all existing MOD x RDX logos throughout the site (navigation header in Layout.tsx, homepage in HomePage.tsx, and mobile sheet menu in Layout.tsx) with the new circular MOD x RDX logo from the uploaded image (Picsart_26-02-20_07-23-40-468.png), ensuring the logo remains clickable and links to the homepage route ('/')

Enable the 'Copy link address' context menu option when users long-press or right-click on images, URLs, and other media elements across the website, including post images in PostCard.tsx and any other media content

Replace the MOD x RDX logo in the navigation header of frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx with the newly uploaded icon.png image, ensuring the logo remains clickable and links to the homepage route ('/')
Replace the MOD x RDX logo on the homepage in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx with the newly uploaded icon.png image, ensuring the logo remains clickable and links to the homepage route ('/')
Replace the MOD x RDX logo in the mobile sheet menu navigation of frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx with the newly uploaded icon.png image, ensuring it is properly sized for mobile view

Apply circular CSS cropping (border-radius: 50%) to the icon.png logo in all locations (navigation header, homepage, mobile menu) to ensure it displays as a perfect circle, without modifying the source image file itself
Update the website background color throughout all pages in frontend/src/index.css to use a visually appealing purple shade by modifying the root CSS variables for both light and dark modes
Add 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font next to the icon.png logo on the left side of the main page in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, ensuring the text and logo are horizontally aligned
Add 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font next to the icon.png logo in the mobile sheet menu navigation in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx, ensuring the text and logo are horizontally aligned
Update the website background and UI color scheme throughout all pages in frontend/src/index.css to use the hex color #7B2EFF by modifying the root CSS variables for both light and dark modes

Integrate the Internet Identity authentication system in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx using the existing useInternetIdentity hook to check authentication state before rendering the post creation form
Add a login button to frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx that triggers Internet Identity authentication flow and displays the user's authentication status
Hide the 'Create Post' navigation link in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx from unauthenticated users so only authenticated developers can see and access the post creation page

Update the useCreatePost mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to properly handle the authenticated actor and display clear error messages when post creation fails due to authorization or other errors
Create a backend data model to store posts with fields: id, title, description, contentType ('text', 'link', or 'image'), content (text/URL), imageUrl (optional), and timestamp
Implement backend methods: createPost, getAllPosts (sorted by newest first), searchPosts (by title/description text match), and getPost by ID

Add Edit and Delete buttons to the PostCard component in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx that are visible only when the authenticated user's principal matches the admin principal stored in the backend
Create an edit post form or modal in the frontend that pre-fills with existing post data (title, description, contentType, content, imageUrl) and allows the developer to update the post
Add a confirmation dialog in the frontend that appears before deleting a post, requiring the developer to confirm the deletion action

Create React Query mutation hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for updatePost and deletePost operations that use the authenticated actor and automatically invalidate the posts cache upon success
Replace the current Edit and Delete text buttons in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx with small icon-style buttons using pencil icon for Edit and trash icon for Delete
Reposition the Edit and Delete icon buttons to the top/upper area of each post card in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx, removing them from their current bottom position

Maintain the existing developer-only visibility logic for the Edit and Delete icon buttons in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx, ensuring they only appear when the authenticated user's principal matches the admin principal
Preserve all existing functionality for the Edit and Delete operations in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx, including the edit form pre-fill behavior and delete confirmation dialog

Add comprehensive error handling to the useCreatePost mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to catch and display clear error messages when post creation fails, including network errors, authorization failures, and validation errors

Add loading state indicators to the post creation form in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx that show when a post is being submitted, disable the submit button during upload, and provide visual feedback that the operation is in progress

Add retry logic with exponential backoff to the useCreatePost mutation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to automatically retry failed uploads up to 3 times before showing an error, improving reliability for intermittent network issues

Add form validation to the post creation form in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx that validates required fields (title, description, content) before submission and displays inline validation errors for missing or invalid data

Update the useCreatePost mutation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to automatically invalidate and refetch the posts query immediately after successful post creation, ensuring the new post appears in the homepage list without manual refresh
Add success toast notification in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx that displays when a post is successfully created, providing clear feedback that the upload completed and the post was saved
Update the three-dot menu dropdown in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx to center-align all menu items (Home, Contact Us, Privacy Policy) vertically for a clean, centered list presentation

Replace the existing Edit icon button in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx with a pencil icon (using lucide-react Pencil component), maintaining its position at the top of the post card, developer-only visibility, and all existing edit functionality including form pre-fill

Replace the existing Delete icon button in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx with a trash/delete icon (using lucide-react Trash2 component), maintaining its position at the top of the post card, developer-only visibility, and all existing delete functionality including confirmation dialog

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage with latest text posts
Option to post clickable links
Image upload/display support
Simple post layout (title + description + link/image)
Copy text button for links
Basic search functionality
About page
Contact page
Privacy Policy page

Update the website background color throughout all pages to a nice purple shade
Add 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font next to the logo on the left side of the main page

Store developer's Internet Identity principal ID in backend for authorization

Add an admin principal ID field to backend/main.mo stable storage and initialize it with a configurable developer principal ID that will be used for authorization checks
Modify the createPost function in backend/main.mo to check the caller's principal ID against the stored admin principal ID and only allow post creation if they match

Implement a deletePost backend function in backend/main.mo that accepts postId, verifies the caller's principal matches the stored admin principal, and removes the post from stable storage if authorized
